app.title: TAB Score Viewer - Guitar Tab Viewer

toolbar.export_tooltip: Export current score (with annotations) as A4 image or PDF
toolbar.audio_tooltip:
Click to switch audio mode
All tracks mix / Current track only / Audio off
toolbar.audio_error_tooltip: Audio engine init failed, please check dependency installation
toolbar.theme_tooltip:
Click to switch Dark/Light theme
Dark mode: Eye-friendly, for night use
Light mode: Bright, for day use/printing

control_panel.shortcut_help:
Space: Play/Pause
Up/Down: Adjust Position
Left/Right: Fine-tune Speed
ESC: Close
Double-click score: Add annotation

messages.open_file_hint:
Please open a guitar tab file
Supported: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, PDF, GP3/GP4/GP5/GPX
messages.select_track_hint: Please select at least one track
messages.delete_confirm_msg:
Are you sure you want to delete this annotation?
This action can be undone (Ctrl+Z).

ab_info.ab_set_both: Please set points A and B first

speed_curve.canvas_group: Speed Curve (click to add control point, drag to adjust, right-click to remove)

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_switch_msg:
Language has been changed. Some UI text will be fully updated on next restart.
Newly opened windows will use the new language.
settings.theme_tooltip:
Click to switch Dark/Light theme
Dark mode: Eye-friendly, for night use
Light mode: Bright, for day use/printing
settings.gtp_theme_tooltip:
Switch tab render theme (GTP files only)
Dark: dark bg + light text
Light: white bg (print-friendly)

Note: Auto-synced on UI theme switch,
this button can override manually
